REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS SHELDON T. FONG AS TRUSTEE OF SHELDON T. FONG, UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC.'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC. IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT HAS PREVIOUSLY DENIED GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT DETERMINATION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BECAUSE SETTLING PARTY FAILED TO ADEQUATELY ADDRESS TECH-BUILT FACTORS, SPECIFICALLY, "A ROUGH APPROXIMATION OF PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL RECOVERY." IN THIS MOTION, MOVING PARTY FAILED TO DO THIS AGAIN. MOVING PARTY'S CALCULATION OF PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL RECOVERY IN THIS ACTION IS LIMITED TO RENT REIMBURSEMENT, LOST WAGES AND PROPERTY DAMAGE DURING THE TIME OF MOVING DEFENDANTS' OWNERSHIP. THIS DOES NOT ACCOUNT FOR ALL ITEMS INCLUDED IN "PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL RECOVERY" IN THIS ACTION, E.G. RECOVERY AS TO OTHER DEFENDANTS, ATTORNEYS' FEES, EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, ETC. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: NEWTON LAM, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

ARGUED re: opposing party not have met burden to establish lack of good faith and certain causes of action that do require attorney's fees. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs SHELDON T. FONG AS TRUSTEE OF SHELDON T. FONG, UNITED THREE GROUPS, INC.'s MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT, ETC. is DENIED without prejudice. The Court has previously denied good faith settlement determination without prejudice because settling party failed to adequately address Tech-Built factors, specifically, "a rough approximation of plaintiff's total recovery." In this motion, moving party failed to do this again. Moving party's calculation of Plaintiff's total recovery in this action is limited to rent reimbursement, lost wages and property damage during the time of moving defendants' ownership. This does not account for all items included in "plaintiff's total recovery" in this action, e.g. recovery as to other defendants, attorneys' fees, emotional distress, etc. Order is signed in open court. (See Scanned Order for Details.) Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
